text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #5)
Last updates: Fri Dec 27 09:21:31 MST 2002     Fri Sep 24 08:44:20 2004     Thu Nov 4 06:13:17 2004 

Than qualifies as abandonware IMO. It is likely that the lacheck program in print/textlive-base is much better and detects errors that textproc/lacheck can't.
